name: 06. Price Calculator
change: Listens on 'PA reported SHOWED' — verify it doesn't depend on the A&D win; re-point to opp outcome if needed.

name: 07. POST-VISIT - SHOWED Opportunities and For Review/Referral
change: This creates the A&D/review opp today. Re-point: trigger on the opportunity Sale Outcome / status instead of creating an A&D win.

name: CAPI - Send Booked Call Data Back to Meta (Leads Moved To Booked Call)
change: Fire on real Won (status=won, value>0) — not the auto A&D win; pass gclid/fbclid.

name: Facebook CAPI - Send Booked Call Data Back to Meta
GHL Form Submitted - Google Ads
change: Ensure gclid present at submit; this is a lead event, keep.

name: 03. Appointment Booked
change: Unchanged in Plan B. One fix: ensure ONE opp per consult (double-calendar issue).
